items.title: watchOS 26.4 fixes a major Apple Watch Workout app complaint
items.summary: Apple redesigned the Workout app in watchOS 26, but not everyone has loved the new Apple Watch exercise tracking experience. It turns out Apple has been listening, because watchOS 26.4 addresses a major complaint about the new design.

items.title: Apple Arcade could use an 'always allow' feature that's separate from App Store
items.summary: I love Apple Arcade. The game catalog really clicks with my son, and a single subscription unlocks hundreds of premium games. The best part is that the games have no ads or in-app purchases. This makes for a much better gaming experience...

items.title: macOS has a 49.7-day networking time bomb built in that only a reboot fixes - comparison operation on unreliable time value stops machines dead in their tracks
items.summary: The macOS networking stack has a bug that creates a 49.7-day-long countdown to disaster that currently requires a reboot to fix, as discovered by AI service provider Photon.
